home.heroSubtitle: A collective dedicated to the architecture of sensory experiences. We craft moments where taste, sound and space resonate together.
home.noEvents: No events available at the moment
home.noTalents: No talents available at the moment
home.heroDescription: An exploration of taste without sound. A sensory deprivation dining experience designed to heighten the palate and focus the mind. Four courses, zero words.
home.metaDescription: Germinal is a collective dedicated to the architecture of sensory experiences. We craft moments where taste, sound and space resonate together through curated events and exhibitions.
home.aboutTitle: A collective at the intersection of art, space, and lived experience.
home.aboutBody: We bring together scenographers, artists, and producers around a single ambition: crafting events that linger long after the lights go out. Every project is built with intention — nothing left to chance.

newsletter.title: Receive our dispatches.
newsletter.subtitle: Event announcements, behind-the-scenes, and cultural notes — delivered when it counts.

events.title: Selected Events
events.description: Explore our curated selection of upcoming exhibition, dining experiences, and architectural tours. Click on any event to view full details.
events.noEvents: No events available at the moment.

talents.title: Talents
talents.description: A roster of multidisciplinary artists, architects and thinkers shaping contemporary culture. Select a profile to view their portfolio.
talents.noTalents: No talents available at the moment.

contact.title: Get in touch.
contact.description: We are always looking for new talents, collaborators, and architectural projects. Reach out to start a conversation.

manifesto.title: What we create
manifesto.intro: We don't manage events. We architect experiences — moments built with method, intention, and sensitivity. Every project is born from our clients' vision and takes shape through a rigorous process, led by a collective of talents who share a single standard: nothing left to chance.

artDirection.title: Art Direction
artDirection.body: Before a space is defined, before a material is selected, there is an idea. Our role is to capture it, refine it, and give it an aesthetic and emotional coherence that runs through every detail of the event. From initial intention to final delivery, we are the guardians of the vision.
artDirection.point1: Global visual concept creation and event identity
artDirection.point2: Sensory palette definition: light, texture, colour, sound
artDirection.point3: Creative direction of all artistic contributors
artDirection.point4: Mood boards, trend books, and visual reference curation
artDirection.imageAlt: An elaborately styled table setting under dramatic golden light, illustrating the precision and intention behind every detail of art direction

scenography.title: Scenography
scenography.body: We think of space not as décor, but as language. Every volume, every texture, every sightline is designed to guide the experience, to establish an atmosphere that asserts itself without explanation. Scenography is the art of making visible what cannot be said.
scenography.point1: Spatial design and bespoke ephemeral architecture
scenography.point2: Furniture, material, and texture selection and arrangement
scenography.point3: Architectural, scenic, and ambient lighting design
scenography.point4: Custom floral, botanical, and artistic installations
scenography.imageAlt: Wide shot of a scenographed event space featuring bold architectural volumes, sophisticated drapery, and subdued lighting creating a dramatic, luxurious atmosphere

production.title: Creative Production
production.body: A successful project is one where the effort is unseen. Behind the apparent elegance lies absolute rigour: team coordination, vendor management, anticipation of the unexpected. We carry this complexity so that you can simply live the experience.
production.point1: Coordination of artistic, technical, and logistics teams
production.point2: Vendor and supplier selection and management
production.point3: Detailed budget tracking and operational oversight
production.point4: Day-of installation, operations, and on-site presence
production.imageAlt: Behind-the-scenes photograph of a production team installing scenographic elements in a large empty space, illustrating the rigour and precision of the production process

approach.title: Our approach
approach.body: Every project is singular. No formula, no standard answer. We begin by listening — to your vision, your constraints, the emotion you want to create. Then we build, with rigour and method, the experience that reflects you. From the first conversation to the last light switched off, we are there.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Germinal ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (RGPD/GDPR).
privacy.dataIntro: We collect the following categories of personal data:
privacy.dataReservation: Reservation data: first name, last name, email address, phone number — collected when you book a Session or create a Reservation.
privacy.dataTechnical: Technical data: IP address, browser user-agent — collected automatically for fraud prevention and site security.
privacy.basisContractual: Contractual necessity: processing your data is required to fulfil the booking contract (creating your Reservation, sending your Ticket, processing payment).
privacy.basisLegitimate: Legitimate interest: we use technical data to prevent fraud and ensure the security of our platform.
privacy.retentionBody: Reservation data is retained for the duration necessary to fulfil the contract plus 3 years for accounting and customer-relationship purposes. Technical data (logs) is retained for 12 months.
privacy.rightsBody: As a data subject, you have the right to:
privacy.rightPortability: Receive your data in a portable format
privacy.rightObject: Object to processing based on legitimate interest
privacy.rightWithdraw: Withdraw your consent at any time
privacy.rightsExercice: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@germinalstudio.co.

mentions.title: Legal Notice
mentions.ipBody: All content on this website (texts, images, graphics, logos) is the exclusive property of Germinal and is protected under French and international intellectual property law. Any reproduction, representation, modification, or adaptation, in whole or in part, without prior written authorisation from Germinal, is strictly prohibited.
mentions.dataBody: Information regarding the collection and processing of personal data is set out in our Privacy Policy.

terms.title: General Terms of Sale
terms.intro: These General Terms of Sale ("CGV") govern all transactions made through the Germinal platform. By placing an order, you accept these terms in full.
terms.offerBody: Our Events and Sessions are presented on the site with their description, date, time, and price in euros (EUR). An order is accepted only upon confirmation by Germinal, sent by email. This confirmation constitutes the formation of the contract.
terms.pricingBody: All prices are displayed in euros (EUR) inclusive of all taxes (TTC). Germinal reserves the right to modify prices at any time; however, the applicable price is the one in effect at the time of order confirmation.
terms.paymentBody: Payment is processed securely via Stripe. We accept major credit and debit cards. Payment is required in full at the time of order to confirm your Reservation.
terms.cancellationBody: Confirmed Reservations may be cancelled for a full refund. Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 14 business days. If Germinal cancels an Event or Session, all affected Reservations will be refunded in full.
terms.liabilityBody: Germinal's liability is limited to the amount paid by the Guest for the relevant Reservation. Germinal shall not be held liable for indirect damages, including loss of profit or opportunity.
terms.governingBody: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Paris, France.

q1.question: How do I retrieve my ticket?
q1.answer: After completing your reservation, you will receive a confirmation email containing a unique link to your ticket. You can also access your ticket at any time by using the token link provided. Your ticket includes a QR code — present it at the entrance on the day of the event.

q2.question: What happens if a session is sold out?
q2.answer: When a session is sold out, you can join the waitlist. If a spot becomes available (e.g. due to a cancellation), you will be notified automatically and given the opportunity to book.

q3.question: How do I cancel my reservation?
q3.answer: You can cancel your reservation by using the cancellation link in your confirmation email, or by contacting us directly. Confirmed reservations are eligible for a full refund, processed to your original payment method within 14 business days.

q4.question: What is the QR code for?
q4.answer: The QR code on your ticket is your digital proof of purchase. Present it at the entrance of the event for scanning. It contains all the information needed to validate your reservation.

q5.question: How can I contact Germinal?
q5.answer: You can reach us through our contact page, by email at privacy@germinalstudio.co, or via our Instagram @Germinal.studio. We typically respond within 48 hours.
